name: H Index
short_description: The Earth's poles began to change places, and this caused chaos. People sensitive to the changes become aggressive and start attacking each other. Scientific minds have created the Hindex scale, which shows the level of activity of storms on a 12-point system.
detailed_description:
There was a catastrophe in the world: the Earth's poles started to change places, and it caused chaos. People sensitive to the changes become aggressive and start attacking each other. Scientific minds have created the Hindex scale, which shows the level of activity of storms on a 12-point system. Your task is to survive in this dangerous world by exploring three mini-locations: forest, city and beach.

Fight a variety of unique enemies, each with special abilities.

Build on your base : barricades (wooden and stone), turrets (regular and flamethrower), barbed and oil nets, electric nets, mines and explosive barrels. Use electrical buildings: generators, solar panels and transformers to build powerful defenses. To build improvements, you need to earn in-game currency. Complete missions to earn currency. You can change the tasks by clicking on the button next to (update). Next to the merchant press E to open the store. Install purchased buildings by pressing TAB, and selecting the desired building with the Q and E keys.

Explore the forest, where the merchant's lair is located, which daily updates the assortment. Purchase health kits, ammo, and building materials using the “material” currency, which can be obtained by killing rabids.

Collect junk around the world to unlock new, improved build types. Explore, fight and survive in this ruthless world where every step you take could be your last!

supported_languages:
English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian*
*languages with full audio support
